title: The Architect Experience at Dreamforce
author: Christophe Coenraets

sections.heading: Introduction
sections.text: A few weeks ago, weannounced the relaunchof the architect program, reaffirming our commitment to delivering authoritative content and fostering community engagement to help you succeed and deliver successful Salesforce implementations. It’s also the best way to stay connected to the program year-round.

raw_html:
A few weeks ago, we announced the relaunch of the architect program, reaffirming our commitment to delivering authoritative content and fostering community engagement to help you succeed and deliver successful Salesforce implementations.

Today, we’re excited to share what the Architect Experience will look like at Dreamforce, where the relaunch comes to life for the first time.

Before Dreamforce

Ahead of the event, we’ll be relaunching the Architect website and social channels with fresh, updated content. The Salesforce Architecture Center will serve as the central hub for architects, offering resources, deep technical content, architecture patterns, and best practices. It’s also the best way to stay connected to the program year-round.

Your architect home base at Dreamforce

Architect Vista will be the dedicated home base for architects at Dreamforce, a place designed to help you learn, connect, and shape the future. As in previous years, you will find it in the heart of the Trailblazer Forest in Moscone West, Level 1. This year, Architect Vista will feature its own dedicated theater, with a session lineup created exclusively for architects. 

All sessions are:

  • 45 minutes long, with time set aside for Q&A, discussions, and whiteboarding.
  • Deeply technical and relevant, with content sourced directly from the experts.
  • Led by rock-star architects and engineers from Salesforce and the community, sharing product insights, best practices, patterns, and lessons from real-world implementations.

Meet the Architects

Stop by for the Meet the Architects sessions in the Architect Vista theater to connect with the Salesforce Architects and engineers shaping Data Cloud, Agenforce, and the Salesforce Platform architecture. Plus, join for a session focused on the Salesforce Architecture Program’s future and share your feedback. We’re excited to introduce you to the talented team supporting this relaunch.

  • Meet the Architects: Agentforce – Oct. 14, 8:30- 9:15 a.m. (all times are PT) – Add to agenda
  • Meet the Architects: Platform – Oct. 14, 12:30-1:15 p.m. – Add to agenda
  • Meet the Architects: Data Cloud – Oct. 15, 11-11:40 a.m. – Add to agenda
  • Meet the Architects – Oct. 16, 1:30-2:15 p.m.  – Add to agenda.

Architect Community Meetup

Connect with fellow Salesforce Architects and the team behind the Salesforce Architecture program relaunch. Share best practices, provide feedback, and grow your network.

Wednesday, Oct. 15, 4:15-5:00 p.m. – Add to agenda

What’s ahead

We are just getting started. Looking ahead, you can expect:

  • A continuous stream of new and updated technical content, keeping resources fresh, relevant, and technically authoritative.
  • More opportunities for engagement through the Architect community.

Join us at Dreamforce

Dreamforce marks an exciting new chapter for architects. Come to the Trailblazer Forest, find Architect Vista, and explore deep technical content, real-world implementation insights, and community connections. 

If you can’t join us in San Francisco, stay tuned. We’ll share more opportunities to engage, provide feedback, and participate in the community after the event.

We look forward to seeing you there.
